cases.question: Export my NeMo Relay run as ATIF so another tool can replay and analyze the trajectory.
cases.ground_truth: Use the ATIF export skill to create an AtifExporter with session and agent metadata, register it before scoped work, run instrumented calls, deregister, flush, and validate the output.
expected_behavior: Choose ATIF rather than live OTLP tracing
Create and register an AtifExporter before work runs
Run scoped tool or LLM activity
Deregister or flush and verify the trajectory output

cases.question: Send NeMo Relay traces to my OTLP-compatible tracing backend.
cases.ground_truth: OTLP tracing belongs to nemo-relay-export-otel, not ATIF trajectory export.
